name: Hot Dog
description: Costco's iconic $1.50 hot dog and soda combo. 100% all-beef frankfurter with a 20 oz drink.

name: Pizza
description: 18-inch cheese or pepperoni pizza. Whole pizza also available for $9.95.

name: Rotisserie Chicken
description: 3-pound seasoned rotisserie chicken. One of Costco's most popular items.

name: Ice Cream
description: Rich vanilla ice cream in a waffle cone or cup. Very generous portion.

name: Churro
description: Cinnamon-sugar churro, crispy outside and soft inside. Seasonal variations available.

name: Chicken Bake
description: Chicken breast, cheese, bacon, and Caesar dressing wrapped in pizza dough.

name: Acai Bowl
description: Fresh acai blend topped with granola, fresh berries, and banana.
